turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my dryer isn't heating properly.
Sorry to hear that — let's see, does the drum tumble normally, just without heat?
Actually, hold on — I smell burning near the dryer right now.

Please stop what you're doing right now: shut off power to the dryer immediately at the wall or the breaker, and step away. This isn't something to keep troubleshooting over the phone — you'll want a professional to take a look. Would you like me to get a technician scheduled?
Good — safety first. Should I go ahead and get a technician out to you?

symptoms.description: dryer isn't heating properly, and now a burning smell near the dryer

steps_given: Stop the dryer immediately and shut off power at the wall or breaker.
Do not attempt any further troubleshooting yourself — this needs a certified technician.
